title: Target Record Schema v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Schema And Tooling Phase Inventory v0
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Schema validation does not make a target record medical advice.
The schema does not accept patient-specific target expression, candidate options, trial matching, actionability scores, or real case data.
The schema does not prove targetability, therapy value, trial availability, eligibility, safety, efficacy, or clinical actionability.
The template is public placeholder data only.
